name: measure-twice
description: Read files before editing them. Measure twice, cut once. Your agent cuts once. Without measuring. Not even once.

interface.shortDescription: Read files before editing them. Measure twice, cut once.
interface.longDescription: Enforces read-before-edit discipline for AI coding agents. Prevents blind edits by requiring the agent to read every file before touching it. Based on real session data showing 1 in 3 edits target unread files.
defaultPrompt: Before editing any existing file, you must read it first using the Read tool. List the files you will touch, read each one, confirm with 'Read: <filepath> ✓', then proceed with edits. Silent skips are never allowed.
